title: Crystallized Beds
description: Custom beds with crystallized frames in different colors!
body:
## This is part of the _Crystallized_ series and requires the [Crystallized Ore](https://modrinth.com/mod/crystallized-ore) mod to craft the beds in survival mode!
The mod adds beds with custom models and textures!

---

In addition with other mods from the Crystallized series, you can craft cool new decorations in a crystallized style. Currently, this is just one other mod ([Crystallized Barrels](https://modrinth.com/mod/crystallized-barrels)), so keep an eye on the series to not miss out any new _Crystallized_ mods
